calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2008 Continued To Sep-02-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: July 10, 2008

This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brian C. Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Estates of Rio Bravo, LP.
Edmund Coyne, Managing Member/General Partner for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Terminating Sanctions were issued by Department 612 on February 22, 2008, and judgment was entered against defendants PB Equities, LLC, Sal Reddy and P. Bidda Holdings, Inc.
Defendant Porus Reddy and Doe defendants were dismissed today, July 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Estates at Rio Bravo, LP, and against Defendants PB Equities, LLC, Sal Reddy and P. Bidda Holdings, Inc. as follows:

Prejudgment Interest - $20,587.80.
Attorney's Fees - $40,209.00.
Costs - $6,800.46, for a total of $67,697.26.

Additionally, in rendering judgment in this case, the Court finds that P. Bidda Holding, Inc., P. Bidda Holding, Inc., (erroneously sued as PB Equities, LLC) and P. Bidda Holding, Inc., a forfeited Nevada Corporation, are one and the same entity.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
